Id1.text: AC Cesena are in the Serie B league, the previous champions of which are Carpi FC 1909.

Id2.text: A.C. Cesena play in Serie B, in which Carpi FC 1909 are the champions.

Id3.text: AC Cesena are in the Serie B league, previously won by Carpi F.C. 1909.
